OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: { "operation": "transform", "HpfListSelected": [ { "Name": "George Acevedo - 1 WISH", "Status__c": "Prospect", "Id": "0bS7x00000041ojEAA", "Employment_Type__c": "Employee", "HPFName": "George Acevedo - 1 WISH", "FacilityTitle": "Ambassador NP/PA", "originalIndex": "0", "uniqueKey": "REC0", "selectrow": true, "HPFAccountId": "0017x00001QUQ2TAAX", "_flex": { "selectedState": {}, "uniqueKey": "REC0" } }, { "Name": "George Acevedo - AF X Facility 2 - EM", "Status__c": "Candidate", "Id": "0bS7x00000041okEAA", "Employment_Type__c": "Employee", "HPFName": "George Acevedo - AF X Facility 2 - EM", "originalIndex": "1", "FacilityTitle": "Ambassador NP/PA", "uniqueKey": "REC1", "selectrow": true, "HPFAccountId": "0017x00001LcOBBAA3", "_flex": { "selectedState": {}, "uniqueKey": "REC1" } } ], "omniScriptId": "0jN7x0000005TnlEAE", "elementName": "TransformSelectedHPFRecords" }
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianOffBoarding

childElements.name: ExtractHpfRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContactId" : "=%getContactId:Account:PersonContactId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "HPF", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRGetHPFRecords", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction4", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: getContactId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContextId" : "=%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "" : "" }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMEGetAccountContactId", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DR_UpdateParentCaseSCP
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%Type%==\"SCP\" && ISBLANK(%DRE_CheckIfOffboardingCaseExists:ScpCase%) && %FullSCPTermination% == true", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "CaseID" : "%Load_SCPOffboardingCases:Case_1:Id%", "AccTeamId" : "=%HPFRec|1:UserId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRLoadSCPCaseOwner", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction4", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRE_CheckIfOffboardingCaseExists
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRCheckOffBoardingCaseExists", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "inputParam" : "ContactId", "element" : "ContactId" }, { "inputParam" : "caseRecordTypeId", "element" : "SV_OffboardingcseRecordTypeId:caseRecordTypeId" } ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction4", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: FacilityListToCreate
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : true, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "listKey" : "OffboardingCases", "matchingPath" : "HpfId", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "listKey" : "DRE_CheckIfOffboardingCaseExists:FacilityCases", "matchingPath" : "Hpf_Id", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ "HpfId" ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : true, "primaryListKey" : "OffboardingCases", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "OffboardingCases", "DRE_CheckIfOffboardingCaseExists:FacilityCases" ], "filterListFormula" : "=HpfId<>Hpf_Id", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Load_OffboardingCases
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%Type%==\"Facility\" && ISNOTBLANK(%FacilityListToCreate%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "recordTypeId" : "%SV_OffboardingcseRecordTypeId:caseRecordTypeId%", "OffboardingCases" : "%FacilityListToCreate%", "ContactId" : "%ContactId%", "AccountId" : "%AccountId%", "caseStatus" : "Not Started", "caseType" : "Facility" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRPCreateOffboardingCases", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Load_SCPOffboardingCases
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%Type%==\"SCP\" && %FullSCPTermination% == true && ISBLANK(%DRE_CheckIfOffboardingCaseExists:ScpCase%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "recordTypeId" : "%SV_OffboardingcseRecordTypeId:caseRecordTypeId%", "OffboardingCases" : "%OffboardingCases%", "ContactId" : "%ContactId%", "AccountId" : "%AccountId%", "caseStatus" : "Not Started", "caseType" : "SCP", "QueueId" : "%SV_OffboardingcseRecordTypeId:QueueId%", "TodayDate" : "=TODAY()", "EmploymentType" : "=%HPFRec|1:Employment_Type__c%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRCreateSCPOffBoardingCases", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_OffboardingcseRecordTypeId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "caseRecordTypeId" : "=QUERY(\"select Id from RecordType where DeveloperName = '{0}' and SobjectType = '{1}'\",'Clinician_Offboarding','Case')", "QueueId" : "=QUERY(\"select Id from Group where DeveloperName = '{0}' and Type = '{1}'\",'Clinical_Match_Queue','Queue')" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRT_SelectedHpfs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "HpfList1" : "=LIST(%HpfListSelected%)" }, "additionalOutput" : { "HPFRecordExist" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%DRT_SelectedHpfs:HpfList:HpfId%),$Vlocity.TRUE,$Vlocity.FALSE)" }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "ResultData", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTTransformSelectedHPFRecords", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : true, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
